title: Intent
description: Operator routing signal. Doctrine §3.4 + §14.4 (structured-slot amendment). The entry point — every pipe chain begins with an Intent. Producers: operator (the only source). Consumers: orchestration layer.

intent.description: Operator utterance — free-form prose framing the ask.

intent_class.description: Optional classification enum (e.g. audit, implement, review, plan, dispatch). Orchestrator may use it for composition selection.

context.description: Inline typed slots — artifact refs, entity handles, mode hints. Doctrine §14.4 multi-modal slot pattern.

constraints.description: Hard guardrails from the operator (e.g. 'no admin-merge', 'shell-first only').

feedback_on.description: Optional reference — prior artifact, verdict, or run_id — this intent reacts to. Feedback-as-pipe-input per doctrine §6.

operator.description: Optional operator identifier for multi-operator contexts.
